UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGFORD, TOMMIE L. $2,416.24 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $949.95 INTEREST, $355.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,241.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-05-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. $100 SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S EARNINGS EACH PAY PERIOD DURING THE WITHHOLDING PERIOD FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD, TOMMIE L.

DISCOVERY, 302, NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ADVANCED FROM MAY-24-2012 TO MAY-04-2012 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 302.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THIS MATTER WAS ADVANCED FROM MAY 24, 2012, BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NOT RECEIVED AND AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING. HEARING HELD ON PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE FUNDS ARE EXEMPTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tommie L. Langford, Judgment debtor in Pro Per

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.
The Judgment Debtor's claim of exemption is Granted. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. $100 shall be withheld from Judgment Debtor's earnings each pay period during the withholding period for payment on the judgment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Advanced From May-24-12 To May-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tommie Langford, 415-240-6544, defendant/claimant in Pro Per
No appearance by plaintiff.

This matter was advanced from May 24, 2012, because defendant has not received and amended notice of hearing.
Hearing held on PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption and the court ruled as follows:
The judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted.
The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. The funds are exempted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Off Calendar
